mapper.insert: insert into batch.alert_event ( tenant_id, service_name, alert_type, severity, title, detail_json, dedup_fingerprint, trace_id, status ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{serviceName}, #{alertType}, #{severity}, #{title}, CAST(#{detailJson} AS jsonb), #{dedupFingerprint}, #{traceId}, coalesce(#{status}, 'OPEN') ) on conflict (tenant_id, dedup_fingerprint) do update set title = excluded.title, detail_json = excluded.detail_json, trace_id = excluded.trace_id, occurrence_count = batch.alert_event.occurrence_count + 1, last_seen_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp
